title: pulmonaria × hybrida
intro: Pulmonaria × hybrida, also known as lungwort, is a hybrid plant species within the Pulmonaria genus, commonly cultivated for its ornamental value and medicinal properties. The plant contains compounds like pulvamine and pulmonarin, which have been traditionally used to treat respiratory issues and as an expectorant to help clear mucus from the lungs. The health benefits of lungwort include its potential to reduce inflammation, boost the immune system, and alleviate symptoms of bronchitis and other respiratory infections. Lungwort can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often used in herbal remedies to support respiratory health and overall well-being.
